containerStyle: background-color: #212529 !important; border: 1px solid #343a40; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 0; box-shadow: 0 0.5rem 1rem rgba(0,0,0,0.5); width: 160px; font-family: sans-serif; z-index: 100002;
itemStyle: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 15px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important; text-decoration: none !important; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 1px solid #343a40;
style: display: inline-flex !important; align-items: center !important; justify-content: center !important; cursor: pointer; background: #e3d5b3 url('https://dspl.innogamescdn.com/asset/7d1f39b6/graphic/index/main_shadow.png') repeat-x !important; border: 1px solid #7d510f; border-radius: 3px; text-decoration: none !important; height: 22px !important; width: 30px !important; margin-left: 5px !important; vertical-align: middle !important; box-sizing: border-box !important;
